file.subject: Citizen ID L-1184
file.summary: Subject recalls standing near a lighthouse on a coastal shore during early childhood. Subject lost all personal memory on Day Zero; this reconstruction surfaced from her archived intake, fully coherent.

records.label: Geographic record
records.value: No lighthouse in region for the stated period.

records.label: Infrastructure log
records.value: Lighthouse dismantled decades before the memory date.

records.label: Subject status
records.value: Amnesic since Day Zero. Cannot confirm or deny.

file.verdict: Contradiction confirmed. System does not flag this as an error.
file.objective: Determine the nature of the contradiction.
